content.en:
Although this kind of trade fair between Dao Ancestors has only been opened once for a long time, it has been a long time since the Void White Dao Ancestor has been a Dao Ancestor, so he has only participated in so many times.

Subsequently, Ye Tian chatted with Xubai Daozu for a while, and had a general understanding of some of the situation of this trade fair.

For example, in this kind of trade fair, there will be many powerful Dao Ancestors coming here, and there are even half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level Dao Ancestors.

For example, the Xuanqing Dao Ancestor of the Tongtian Origin Domain has also come many times.

There are many district boundaries, and there are many regional boundaries that are stronger than the Tongtian Plain Domain boundary, and the major regional boundaries pass through the Dao Gate, even if they are far apart, they can quickly reach here, and there is no need to pass through the extremely dangerous Silent Black Sea region.

"Has the Sevenfold Ancestor ever attended the fair?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Xubai Dao Ancestor's face was shocked, "Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, I have never seen it, where would there be a Sevenfold Origin Ancestor participating in such a trade fair!"

From the mouth of the Void White Dao Ancestor, I learned that the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor was mysterious and unpredictable, belonging to legends, and almost never seen it, but there were some half-step Sevenfold Ancestors, but the number was not much.

Many half-step Sevenfold Ancestors would venture deep into the depths of the Silent Black Sea in search of other, more powerful realms.

It is said that in the depths of the Silent Black Sea, there is a continuous stretch of Black Mountain that cuts off the Silent Black Sea, and that Black Mountain contains a large number of primitive antiquities.

Without the strength of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, there was no hope of passing through it at all.

If you can't get through, you won't be able to go deeper into the area.

At present, there are about tens of thousands of known district boundaries, which are the comprehensive boundaries of this area, and as for the half-step sevenfold ancestor, the total number of known tens of thousands of district boundaries is only hundreds.

"Ancient Dao Ancestor, it is said that he crossed that black mountain in the first place, went to the deeper boundary, and never came back!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, not feeling strange that the Ancient Dao Ancestor broke into the Black Mountain and left.

After all, the Ancient Dao Ancestor condensed the Ninefold Dao Ancestor, and the cultivation when he left had reached the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and his strength was naturally no less than that of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor, so he could naturally leave.

Before I knew it, a few days had passed.

this day.

The fair officially began, and Dao ancestors traded with each other to exchange for goods.

Ye Tian was also ready to trade, he was ready to trade with the Primordial Ancient Bead.

The value of the Primordial Ancient Bead is very high, and it can even repair the wounds of the Dao Fruit, and some Dao Ancestors' Dao Fruit is damaged, and they are even willing to go bankrupt to trade the Primordial Ancient Bead.

Every Dao Ancestor knew that if he killed a Primordial Ancient, he could obtain the Primordial Ancient Pearl, but even if he was a powerhouse at the peak of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, it would be a bit troublesome to kill a Primordial Ancient.

Moreover, the Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor did not dare to hunt the Primordial Ancients, and he was accidentally surrounded and killed, thus falling in the Silent Black Sea.

Of course, if the Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor made a move, he could naturally easily kill the weaker Primordial Ancients, but the Primordial Ancient Beads were so precious, even if the Half-Step Sevenfold Primordial Ancestors could easily obtain the Primordial Ancient Beads, it would not be possible to sell them cheaply.

Therefore, the price of the Primordial Ancient Bead was very high, and for Dao Ancestors, who were in dire need, they were even willing to buy all their resources.

When Ye Tian revealed that he had the Primordial Ancient Bead on his body, many Dao Ancestors came to Ye Tian.

Among them, there are many Dao Ancestors in the middle stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and there is even a Dao Ancestor in the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

Maybe some Dao Ancestors are not short of primordial ancient beads now, but if you buy one, you can make the final card!

The Primordial Ancient Bead can not only repair any injuries and Dao Fruits, but can even save your life at a critical moment!

The more good things like this, the better!

And Ye Tian used these primordial ancient beads in exchange for a large amount of resources.

However, there are also some Dao Ancestors who don't have any resources, and Ye Tian naturally won't trade with them.

......

"That's right, this time I used these Primordial Ancient Beads in exchange for a lot of resources, and I can cultivate for a while longer!" Ye Tian muttered.

If you're lucky, there's still hope that you'll be able to raise your cultivation to the late stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

this day.

A Dao Ancestor came to the Shattered Void Giant City and directly announced the sale of the location of an Primordial Ancient Live.

As soon as this news came out, many Dao Ancestors rushed over.

"Mingyu Dao Ancestor, what you said is true? You found the location of a primordial ancient nest? What kind of primordial antiquity's ancient nest?"

Half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Xuanqing Dao Ancestor asked.

"Xuanqing Dao Ancestor!" Ming Yu Dao Ancestor said respectfully: "It's the ancient nest of the Yuan Shen Drum!"

"Really?"

Xuanqing Dao Ancestor took a deep breath and was a little excited.

The ancient nest of the Yuanshen Drum, how many Yuanshen Drums must be in it, if you kill so many Yuanshen Drums, you can get a large amount of black liquid.

The black liquor is helpful for the Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor to comprehend the Yuan Dao, and it is also useful for the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, if you obtain a large amount of black liquid, it will have a great effect!

It was already very difficult for the Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor to improve his strength, and it would take a long time to improve a little, so they didn't want to give up any opportunity to improve their strength.

Suddenly, the other Dao Ancestors also wanted to know the location of that ancient nest.

......

"The Ancient Nest!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He naturally knew what the Ancient Nest was, the Ancient Nest was the place where the primordial antiquities were concentrated, born somewhere in the Silent Black Sea, and completely wrapped in the Silent Black Sea, it was difficult to perceive, and he had to be very close to the Ancient Nest to be able to perceive the existence of the Ancient Nest.

In addition, the Nest will also change, but it will stay in one place for a long time!

The Yuanshen Drum has only recently come to this silent Black Sea area, so some Dao Ancestors speculate that the ancient nest of the Yuanshen Drum has arrived, but they can't find this ancient nest.

The ancient nest can be connected to all directions, and the Genshin drum in the ancient nest can appear anywhere at will.

And one of the reasons why the primordial antiquities are so elusive is that they come from the ancient nest.

Then.

Mingyu Daozu said: "I am trading the location of the ancient nest this time, and there is definitely a Yuan Shen Drum in that ancient nest, as for how many, I don't know." Every Dao Ancestor who trades with me must make a Dao Fruit oath not to reveal his location, and not to lead other Dao Ancestors to that ancient nest. "

As soon as many Dao Ancestors heard this, they understood Mingyu Dao Ancestor's plan, which was clearly to use a message to sell to a large number of Dao Ancestors, so as to earn resources!

However, they still have to trade like this, otherwise the other Dao ancestors will not be able to reap the benefits after they have passed!

Subsequently, a Dao Ancestor traded with Mingyu Dao Ancestor.

Moreover, the chips asked for by Mingyu Dao Ancestor were not high, and any Dao Ancestor could afford to pay them.

After a while, Mingyu Dao Ancestor obtained a large amount of resources.
